provisions.title: Full text
provisions.content:
SAFE OPERATION OF REGULAR RO-RO FERRY
AND HIGH-SPEED PASSENGER CRAFT SERVICES

[ L.S.234.35

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 234.35
MERCHANT SHIPPING (SAFE OPERATION OF
REGULAR RO-RO FERRY AND HIGH-SPEED
PASSENGER CRAFT SERVICES REGULATIONS**
1 ta’ April, 2003
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 433 tal-2003, kif emendat bl-Att XV tal-2009.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew Imħassrin bl-Avviż Legali 345 tal-2019.

1
